# Data Source: okta_group_rules

Get a list of group rules from Okta.

## Example Usage

{{tffile "/Users/rmcgregor/Development/terraform-provider-okta/examples/data-sources/okta_group_rules/data-source.tf"}}

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `search` (String) Searches rules by name for matching value.

### Read-Only

- `group_rules` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--group_rules))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--group_rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `group_rules`

Read-Only:

- `expression_type` (String)
- `expression_value` (String)
- `group_assignments` (List of String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `users_excluded` (List of String)
